holdings.infoBox: DXUV is an equity ETF with a total of 2008 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 4.79%, Apple at 4.19%, Microsoft at 4.01%, Amazon.com at 2.33%, and Meta Platforms at 1.80%.

overview.description: The Dimensional US Vector Equity ETF (DXUV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed, broad portfolio of US companies, with an increased exposure to firms with smaller capitalization, lower relative price, and higher profitability. DXUV was launched on Sep 10, 2024 and is issued by Dimensional.
